arts.ttl: Barcelona supporters platform calls for Laporta’s resignation over Dani Olmo case
arts.sum: “From Som un Clam we want to express our total indignation caused by the management of president Joan Laporta and the board of directors regarding the registration situation with Dani Olmo and Pau Víctor, and we demand their resignation. Barça supporter platform ‘Som un clam’, led by Joan Camprubí Montal, have issued a statement demanding the resignation of the Barcelona president.

arts.ttl: Simple solution to disastrous Dani Olmo situation ruled out for Barcelona
arts.sum: Neither Dani Olmo (nor Pau Víctor, who is in the same situation) can be loaned out by Barcelona for the remainder of the season because RFEF regulations require players to be registered to facilitate a loan. Neither Dani Olmo nor Pau Víctor will be able to be loaned by the Blaugrana club between now and the end of the season, as the General Regulations of the RFEF require registration in order to be able to carry out a loan.

arts.ttl: Why Barca are ‘optimistic’ they will be able to register Olmo
arts.sum: Barcelona are said to be “optimistic” they can convince La Liga to register Dani Olmo and Pau Victor for the rest of the 2024-25 season. According to RAC1 and Marca, Barca are confident that the two players will be registered and that they will return to the 1:1 rule on Friday.
